title: billardiera cymosa subsp. pseudocymosa
intro: Billardiera cymosa subsp. pseudocymosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae, commonly known as the blueberry ash. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Billardiera cymosa subsp. pseudocymosa include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
